calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-05-2018 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2017 Set For Trial On Apr-30-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-30-2017 Continued To Jul-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-17-2017 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. E. GERARD MANNION OF MANNION & LOWE, TEL. NO. 1-415-733-1052 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. KURT D. MILLER OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CATHERINE A. WALSH, TEL. NO. 1-925-825-9500 EXT. 16 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendant Brandon Iacobo's motion to strike the request for exemplary damages from the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff David Quinby is denied. Mr. Quinby has adequately alleged that Mr. Iacobo acted despicably and with willful and conscious disregard with Mr. Quinby's rights by driving a motor vehicle in a "sufficiently" intoxicated condition that affected his ability to drive safely. While this allegation is thin, it is sufficient for pleading purposes and to allow Mr. Quinby to conduct discovery. Mr. Iacobo's remedy is to propound contention discovery and, if he continues to believe there is no support for the punitive damages prayer, file a motion for summary adjudication. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189 =302/hk
